unanswered.review_text: Food was mediocre at best. Reminds me Chi Chi's and you see where they are.

I have been here four times over the past couple of months.

The first time, my partner found mold on her corn tortilla. To their credit, management handled the situation exceptionally well. They took it seriously, apologized, and made it right, which is why I decided to give them another chance.

The next two visits were excellent. The food was great, and the staff was friendly and attentive.

Unfortunately, my fourth visit was frustrating from start to finish.

I first called to place a carryout order, but it seemed like the hostess who answered the phone set it down and forgot about me. I understand they were probably busy, so I simply ordered through the website instead. Since the website doesn't let you specify tortilla type, I called back to confirm that along with my pickup time.

I arrived at the pickup time they gave me, waited nearly ten minutes, and then my order came out missing one of my three meals.

When I pointed it out, the hostess insisted I had only ordered two meals and pointed to her ticket.  She repeatedly insisted I had only ordered two meals until I pulled out my phone and showed her the order confirmation with three meals. Once she realized the mistake, she called the manager over, who told me it would be another 7 to 10 minutes to make the missing meal.

I explained that I had already waited past my pickup time and asked if I could simply receive a refund for the missing meal instead. There was no apology, they wouldn't refund it, and there was no real concern that they had made a mistake. The only solution offered was for me to wait longer while they remade it. Both the manager and the hostess just seemed irritated that there was a problem rather than interested in resolving it.

Eventually, I told them I would just try to sort it out with my credit card company and left.

In the end, I paid for three meals, left with only two, and AGAIN we found MOLD on the tortillas!

If you enjoy waiting an extra 30 minute for your food this is your place due to and I quote "we got hella people in here".

Not the first time this has happened, just go somewhere else.

We have eaten there many times over the past 3-4 years. This was for Father's Day and a birthday with 13 people. I called ahead to ensure they could accommodate one table w 13 people, in the side room. Was assured they could. They cannot.

We spilled salsa on the table shortly after being delivered. We apologized and the waiter said he'd take care of it. He did NOT till asked a 3rd time and only after we had finished our meals.

One entree was not what was ordered. Requested a menu to ensure the correct item was ordered; never provided. When the re-order came through, it did not contain the correct side dish. Asked 3 times, never corrected.

Another entree required corn tortilla (gluten allergy). Asked 4 times, finally brought after most of the others had completed their meal and that entree had cooled off.

When all of this was summed up to the waiter at the end of the meal, we were told "my bad, boss".

We stated at the beginning of the meal that we were celebrating a birthday. Most of the guests had left by the time we sang happy birthday at the end of the meal. There was zero recognition of a birthday, which is not consistent with other times we've eaten/celebrated there.

We will go elsewhere.

The worst restaurant experience I have ever had.

I placed a takeout order with Ava S. and, after a 30-minute drive home, discovered that my $56 order was poorly prepared, under-seasoned, carelessly thrown together, and partially undercooked. There was even hair wrapped around my jalapeño peppers. The food was so unappetizing that I wouldn't have served it to anyone.

What makes this experience even worse is what I witnessed while waiting for my order. I watched the manager handling fruit garnishes for drinks with his bare hands immediately after touching a yellow and black bag, directly in front of the garnish tray. No gloves, no handwashing—nothing. It was unsanitary and honestly should have been my sign to leave.

When I called simply requesting that my food be replaced, the manager hung up on me. I wasn't asking for a refund, causing a scene, or demanding anything unreasonable. I just wanted the food I paid for to be prepared correctly. Instead, I was met with rudeness and complete disregard for customer service.

I'm not someone who typically leaves negative reviews, but the combination of poor food quality, questionable food-handling practices, and a manager hanging up on a paying customer is unacceptable. Customers deserve to know what they're walking into.

There are plenty of Mexican restaurants in the area that take pride in cleanliness, quality food, and treating customers with respect. Unfortunately, this establishment appears more concerned with taking your money than providing a positive dining experience.

The economy is too expensive for customers to spend their hard-earned money on food that is carelessly prepared and service that is openly disrespectful. Based on what I witnessed, I have serious concerns about the cleanliness standards being followed. If employees are handling drink garnishes with bare hands, it raises legitimate questions about what other health and safety practices may be ignored behind the scenes.

At this point, they can keep the remake. After the way I was treated by management, I have no interest in returning. I will be reporting my concerns to the health department so they can determine whether proper food safety procedures are being followed.

Extremely disappointed, disgusted, and frustrated.

Was passing through the area and decided to try because it had 4.1 stars.
The food here is not good. There were 3 of us and meals were edible but too salty and not flavorful.
There was 1 server working on a Sunday, she was friendly and doing her best

This place has the potential to be really good but it's inconsistent. The wife and I went for Taco Tuesday today, and the tacos hardly had any meat.  It felt really skimpy even for $2 each. They used to be generous with their portions. We also had to argue for them to include the green and spicy salsas, which they used to include no problem. Neither of us had a good experience unfortunately.

Ridiculous. I came in last night with a party of 11 at 7PM. Took the server 25 minutes just to take our drink order. Then another 45 minutes just to have our food come out, come to find out they’re out of steak, fries, beans, and quite literally everything we wanted to order. We were not notified that in the beginning either. I understand having a new server, but why put that sever on a party of 11 with 5+ kids? Won’t be coming back to this location ever again. We spent 100+ dollars, and absolutely no apology from our original server.

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times

Be8ng from Houston, Tx and knowing what authentic Mexican food taste and smells like..there is nothing authentic about this place..people of Michigan are being bamboozled with what they think authentic is. The host had horrible customer service and not welcoming (long wavy brown hair lady)..I asked for no tomatoes on my dish it was LOADED with tomatoes..smh...and they didn't apologize or even offer to make it over..AND THE CHIPS AND SALSA are store bought and not house made..would never go back...

Came here for half off appetizers about an hour before closing. The hostess sat my mom but never informed the waitress that she had a table, so she sat there waiting and had to ask someone else who was going to wait on her.

After we ate and paid, we were tidying up the table to make it easier for our waitress to pick everything up (like we always do when we got out to eat), and for some reason another waitress (Olivia) that didn’t wait on us kept coming up to our table, rushing us. She started cleaning the table off while we were still there and told us that they’re closed at they need to sweep and mop. Unsure why she felt the need to tell paying customers that they needed to hurry up and leave.

When we decided to escalate the issue to another employee (possibly a manager, unsure), she followed us and stood behind us. I thought she was in a rush to clean? Why did she stop cleaning to come be nosy? Wasn’t she in a rush because the restaurant was now closed? Wouldn’t her standing there listening be holding her up?

Not only did she stop cleaning (which is why she was rushing us), but she then proceeded to argue with my mother and try to throw us out.

She had no right to come to our table rushing us. We were finished eating and already cleaning up. We had already paid. Olivia is unprofessional, rude, and lacks etiquette. Please retrain her.

unanswered.review_text:
I've adjusted my rating down to 1 star at this point.

After posting my original review, I received a response asking me to reach out so they could make things right. I did exactly that on June 3rd, and as of today, June 8th, I have not received any response or follow-up.

Unfortunately, the lack of communication and customer service has made it clear that our business is not valued. I sincerely hope you take steps to improve the experience for future guests; otherwise, you may continue to lose customers. To make matters worse, all of this stems from a $45 crab meal and one additional entrée. After leaving a generous tip, our total came to approximately $85. Based on this experience and the way the situation has been handled, we will not be ordering from this establishment again. Take care.

Update 5/31/2026
I've decided to update my review because I feel the quality of this restaurant has declined.

Ever since I first tried the crab legs, I've been a loyal customer, ordering them at least once a month. Up until now, they've been consistently good. This time, however, I placed an online order and was very disappointed. When I opened my meal, the sauce tasted completely different than usual. It was extremely oily, lacked flavor, and did not resemble what I've received in the past.

I also paid for extra cucumbers but received very few. Despite tipping well and spending approximately $85 on the order, the overall experience fell far short of expectations.

I called the restaurant right away and was told that the cooks prepared the meal the same way they always do. I explained that the taste was noticeably off, but my concerns weren't really addressed. I then spent several days trying to reach someone and wasn't able to speak with anyone until three days later.

At first, it seemed like the situation would be resolved with a replacement meal. Instead, I was offered a discount on a future order. As someone who has consistently supported this business, recommended it to friends and family, and returned month after month, being offered only a discount felt disappointing and dismissive.

I don't enjoy leaving negative reviews, especially for a place I've genuinely enjoyed for so long, but this experience left me feeling undervalued as a loyal customer.

3/6/26 Angel & Mayra make the best crab legs I have ever had. Omar & Fatima are always so kind, quick and attentive. Will come back again and again because of the quality of the food and the service here. Never been so comfortable in a restaurant! 😊

Update: Came up this evening, and Yasmine took care of us. She was amazing and so attentive. She knows what she is doing and gave us the best experience here!

Update: I came back to try the crab legs, and they did not disappoint. It was the most flavorful I've ever had! This is officially our new favorite place!

This place is gorgeous! Right when you walk in, you notice that it's colorful and well decorated. The bar is beautiful and lights up nice. A lot of wows walking in. Comfortable and warm environment with nice employees. Fabian was who served us, and he did great!  Didn't wait long for our food at all. The prices aren't bad whatsoever. There is so much to choose from on the menu. A lot of phenomenal looking drinks, too. I ordered the steak fajita quesadilla. 10/10 - by far, the best quesadilla I have ever had. My man had the carnitas. Those were outstanding, too! 10/10, everything tasted flavorful and perfect. Will most definitely be back to try the crab legs!! 🦀 Their cheese dip is pretty good, too. 10/10 You won't be disappointed coming to this place. We enjoyed our experience and will tell about it to all!

I wouldn’t know how to describe the food because I never received service. After sitting at the table for 10 minutes watching three other tables be sat after me and getting served without me being offered a glass of water, I left.

Absolutely terrible, fiance went with her mother because Mexican Fiesta was closed, she ordered the tacos, they told her the shells were homemade, thats a lie,  they're clearly store bought Ortega Shells, werwnt even fried, and ha dno flavor at all, she ate half of one and didnt touch it agian after, absolutely terrible.
Photo of her meal below
Slow service, fish tacos not well seasoned, cold and dry rice.  Beef tacos all carte were OK.

Years ago I gave this place 5 stars.  Now twice in a row I've been sat and ignored, while tables sat after mine were served.  Asking a passing employee if they could send our server over didn't help either time.  Requests to speak to a manager were met with shrugs.  Find somewhere else for your taco and marg fix.

Food did not have any flavor to it .
Service okay…I chicken tacos and got beef instead.
Watered down margaritas and mid unseasoned tacos for which I had to wait almost 35-40 minutes.
Burrito was mainly rice and beans, paid for chicken in my beef Burrito and got 4 tiny pieces.  Won't be back.

I was really excited to try this restaurant simply because of the outdoor seating! The tables were nice and I do have to add that the color of the chairs and table did not absorb heat so they were not too hot even with direct sun on them! With the light wind our umbrella was spinning around and we had to hold it in place for the entire meal. The host was very nice in trying to help us fix it but we gave up on it in the end. After getting our drink orders, our server came to the table every 25-30 minutes, our drinks sat empty even after he came over to check on us. I did ask him and he was pretty fast about the refill but did not grab refills for the whole table. When my burrito came out it only had the protein inside of it a little sauce and a little pico de mango on the top, it was tasty, but it was $18…for a dry corn tortilla with a few pieces of protein. For the check, the toast system was used, which is normally fine, but the tip percentages were 18%, 25%, 30% which is outrageous. I always tip because I know restaurants don’t pay their servers enough but with the service we received I would not have tipped even 18%, maybe 15%.

Let's start this off by saying im a hard working person i went there with a friend I got nachos and for the money I paid you gave me a bunch of chips and a pile of sour cream and 2 whole slices of tamato I could of made better nachos drunk with velveeta cheese who ever made those nachos should never be in the kitchen so I gave you my hard earned money and now eating a lunch meat sandwich man I appreciate ya oh did I mention there was no meat and no cheese come on you dont care about paying customers to feed me that garbage
I’ve been to this restaurant a few times though food wasn’t good on This last visit Rice was stale and tacos we’re not tasty as well!

It takes a LOT for me to review a restaurant negatively. But I’ve never been more offended in my life. We specifically asked how many chicken tenders come in a child’s meal. We were told 4. They were 2 cut in half and they were the size of a chicken nugget from McDonald’s. My 4 year old would need 3 meals and my 2 year old would need 2. What a disgrace. And we got it as carry out so we couldn’t do anything about it. I’m so mad about this. I got carry out to make my life slightly easier and here I am now trying to whip up a meal for my kids.

I had a pregnancy craving for birria tacos, so we decided to order some takeout tonight (5/30). By the time we got home after picking up the food, I realized that the consommé wasn’t in the to go order. I guess I should’ve double checked the contents of the bag before leaving, but I didn’t want to tear into it yet.

I was really disappointed because the whole point was to have the rich hearty broth to dip the tacos in. (side note- I also asked for utensils but none were provided :/). That oversight bummed me out as I was hungry and didn’t want to go all the way back just to pick up that one thing.
Lots of empty tables and yet we were told a 35+ minute wait. No thanks! We won't be back.

How this place has good ratings is a mystery. The service is so bad, you feel like you are inconveniencing them. It's so bad it seems intentional. Food is good but there is a better Mexican restaurant on every corner. Don't waste your money

unanswered.review_text: I ordered the Champion cocktail, and it had zero shrimp aguachiles, just onions and tomatoes. I don't recommend it for the price or the quality.

5/24/2026: 7:00pm.

I was sat at a dirty table. Most of the servers around me were on their phones.  The chips were stail and cold. My waitress only checked on me once or twice.  I could see if The place was packed but it wasn't.Do better
Horrible experience with carry out will not get anything from there ever again!!!
Ordered a chimichanga… got burrito bowl. If you read this and didn’t know - a chimichanga is a fried burrito  - with …the …ingredients inssiiiiddeeeeee. $20 of disappoinment

Waited in line to be seated for over an hour on Cinco De Mayo. The restaurant was basically empty with plenty of tables open. The restaurants management stopped seating IN HOUSE CUSTOMERS to prioritize online orders. Kept telling us 20 minutes and then told
Us an hour and a half. Never have seen such a horribly ran restaurant. Will never come back.
Very over priced and sub par...

We had a really disappointing experience and won't be coming back. The watermelon mojito was overly sweet with blackened mint and wasn't muddled. The chicken taco tasted metallic like it came from a can and was dripping wet. We ordered a combo that was supposed to come with a burrito but got a cold enchilada with sauce tasting like outbof a jar instead. The chalupa and chips tasted like they were fried in old oil and were inedible. We order a flan to share (before the food arrived) and. we were glad to hear that wasn't available, given how bad everything else was. On top of all this, they charged us an extra $2.00 for the steak taco when the menu said it was only a $0.75 upcharge. We didn't make a scene over the overcharge and still left a 20% tip since it's not the server's fault the kitchen can't cook properly, but we're definitely never going back. This place needs to seriously fix their food quality and their oil because everything tasted bad.

Came the first time and didn’t like it. Thought maybe just a bad day. Came a second time and it still didn’t taste good. Stale chips and the ground beef tasted like dog food. My son got the kids meal and his fries were hard and looked similar to those you buy at meijer. I want to support a local business, maybe I’ll get again if the food improves or chef changes idk.

Definitely not what I expected for authentic Mexican Cuisine. My order was blah. Admittedly, my guest ate all of their food. We ordered two rounds of margaritas, and I probably could have had 15 rounds and still not feel tipsy. We both agreed that there appeared to be no tequila in the drinks. The server was okay, but not very welcoming. The spacing was such that they packed a lot of tables into that space so, even going to the restroom you had to twist and maneuver around seated guests.

I visited this restaurant yesterday with my daughter, and the experience was deeply disappointing from start to finish. We waited 40 minutes for two simple quesadillas while sitting on the patio. During that time, I requested water three separate times and never received it. Leaving guests outside without water is not only irresponsible but unsafe in 80+ degrees.

When I finally asked for the check, I was overheated and still had no water,  the waitress wanted to argued with me, insisting that “it had only been 40 minutes,” rather than acknowledging the issue or offering any assistance with getting my water(still no water given). She then glared at me during checkout and refused to speak to me, despite the fact that I paid my full bill and did not request any refund.

To make matters worse, when we received the quesadilla to go, it was stone cold.

This level of disregard for customer care and basic hospitality is unacceptable. I will not be returning, and I hope management takes immediate steps to address these issues so no other guests have a similar experience.

We had a party of 20 Saturday may 9th for my cousin bday unfortunately the beef was terrible everyone of us who ordered beef tacos or something with beef in it experienced nausea and sickness my Neice worst of them all she had two beef Barria tacos well today she is in the hospital with a stomach virus fever of 104 degrees and now a team is looking into her having GI issues something with her pancreas after eating that beef, I also read another review where a lady said after eating here she started experiencing GI problems I pray this doesn’t affect my Neice that bad she is 18 she has senior finals today and prom on the 21st what a terrible time for this to happen. The beef did taste funny me myself was nauseated that night had a headaches chills and threw up same with my Neice I only ate half taco because it tasted funny I knew something was wrong with from the first two bites…… we will be looking into a lawyer because everyone said the same thing some of us sitting ten seats down from each other and the other side of the table was sending the beef back as well and complaining. DONT EAT THE BEEF HERE!!!!!!!

If i could rate this place zero I would. Rarely do I ever take my time to write a bad review, I understand when places are busy and need that grace. Used to come here often a couple years ago and it would be decent. Today (mother’s day) I went in and placed an order for carry out for 2 tacos and a queso, to bring to my grandma. They said the estimated wait was 15 minutes, I came back 15 minutes later and was told 5 minutes. 5 minutes later, the host says another 10 minutes. At this point I was just disappointed in being told inaccurate times multiple times. After 35 minutes, I am going to be late to my grandma’s and the food is still not ready. I ask for a refund, and someone comes out to give me a refund. I express that I really wish I would have known it was a 30+ minute wait, or I would not have ordered due to time restraints. Right after this, alberto, goes “20 minutes”, as if I was lying about timing. THIS was exactly why I decided to write this review. (My receipt says 5:15pm and we left the restaurant at 5:51). Anyways…. the hosts were doing the best they could with communicating so I appreciated their help.
We had a reservation for a memorial luncheon.  The service was so slow and the food was cold.  We sat there for 3 hours.  The waiter hardly checked on us.

Was better years ago. Now, they get the order wrong often and the cost is high enough that it can’t be forgiven. We thought it might be an issue just with takeout, but our dine in experience was not better. Good luck if you want cheese on your chorizo quesadilla. The best item has been the steak tacos American style. Unfortunately, we won’t be back.

I have been here twice. Both times I have tried very authentic mexican recipes,  each and every time they did not use the authentic types of cheese that you would use in a very authentic Mexican recipe. They use nacho cheese!  Nacho cheese! In place of the for real melty, authentic muenster cheese that you NORMALLY put in regular mexican recipes. Tacos queso birria.. nacho cheese in that.... Yuck!! Put real cheese in that.  That's lazy cooking. Chile rellenos.... tried that too! also tried to pass that off as authentic with some nacho cheese filling. How can you put that on a plate
?! Oh! I know! Money talks! Real Mexican heritage cooking, well, it doesn't matter here. They are very lazy in their cooking. They know better than to use what they're using in mexican cooking.

False advertising—the Farmington Hills location refused to honor its own promotion. The Facebook post made today clearly states ‘Dine-In and Take-Out.’ When I attempted to place a carry-out order for the $1.99 Tuesday special, I was told it was dine-in only. This directly contradicts what was advertised.
This is misleading and unacceptable. The flyer appears to be nothing more than a tactic to draw customers in under false pretenses. I spoke with a manager who acknowledged the Facebook post but still refused to honor it. Businesses should be held accountable for the promotions they advertise.
I got the double chicken and steak fajitas and instead of adding more steak and chicken they just put extra veggies, wasn’t enough for two people.
We got sent to the wrong place and they were not helpful at all. Guess there are 2 within. few miles. they were closed and just kept telling me they were closed.  got it
Some food came out room temp.  It was reheated but still not as hot as it should have been.  Also had rusty lettuce on our meals.

Recent takeout order we had ordered two tacos (on top of a few other meals for the family)and they tried to charge us for the taco dinner (and yes the dinner was there in the bag) but I explicitly ordered just two tacos, we didn't need the entire meal that's $10 more. So I brought it up to them before I left; the hostess went to get the manager and instead of just giving us the two tacos and having me pay for them, they removed the entire dinner from the bag and stated they could not just sell me the two tacos that I had ordered over the phone for some reason. They didn't even try to fix the issue (considering their person wrote down the order incorrectly) and I didn't get to eat anything because they removed my order. I would've been fine just taking the two tacos or literally anything else rather than leaving without a meal for part of my family and paying for it...

Maybe I'm overreacting, maybe not, but it really rubbed me the wrong way considering we (not kidding when I say this) spend over $2000 a year at this particular location (my wife is a queso fiend). Suffice to say it will be some time before we return...
Took 2 hrs to be served are food. Food was delicious and they where out of beans
All the food is bland and flavorless nowadays and the meat is always dried out.

My husband and I were craving Mexican food. Based on so many positive recent reviews we decided on Los Tres Amigos Northville. The reviews  did not match our experience.  Jalepeno poppers did not appear to be freshly made and the cheese was cool and solid not hot and gooey. Sample Platter quesadilla  also had cool set cheese. The flauta and chimichanga were warm not hot. The Sample Platter had one positive, the lettuce looked fresh. Living in San Diego and visiting multiple regions in Mexico, fajitas were always served on a sizzling skillet. We were served a pile of peppers and onions in a shallow dish. We had to hunt for the steak. Many reviews rave about the service.  Unfortunately, we don't share the same opinion. I am not sure why our food and service did not live up to others reviews but we will not be returning or recommending this restaurant.

Unfortunately the last two times we ate at this restaurant my family and I got super sick. I actually had to go to the hospital for one of them. We will never eat here again. I don’t know what is different the last two months but before that we never had any problems.
Not sure about the food, we had a party of eight. We were seated outside and forgotten about for a half hour, so we left.

Waited to long for a waitress. Food wasn't great
Will not go there again.
Horrible experience. The table was too small for eight people so we sat outside and waited and waited and waited. No one ever served us.

We went for my aunts birthdays w a party of 13, the server was pretty nice until we got out check . One of my aunts asked to pay separate for js her and her kids and spouse. When the server came back with the check she only came w two , we were co fused cs we never said we were all going to pay tg . The server told my mom to write down who’s meal was in each check HERSELF and told us that there were only allowed two checks for in total per party the bartender told my mom that’s how things are done in Chicago (because we are here from kcmo) honestly the whole thing was stressful and unnecessary we won’t be coming back because of the lack of decent of asking if there was going to be more than one check or at least telling us in the beginning before even getting our order that only two checks were allowed

Horrible food and service

It took about an hour to get my drink My queso was freezing cold. There was a weird layer on my queso I’m guessing from
Sitting so long before bringing it to the table. My tamales were freezing cold. All of the food took forever. My taco was freezing Cold came with lettuce and I asked without. There was blood all over the women’s toilet seat? My server just said oh sorry and never did a single thing about it. all in all never going there again.

nice place , service was a little slow with no offers to refill drinks.  never got my extra napkins and our table was sticky .. ordered a combo of a beef burrito and a taco . ive had better tacos at taco bell .. the burrito had uncooked ground beef in it. the taco shell was straight up ortega quality at best not homemade like other mexican places .. will not repeat

My experience wasn't the best. The girl who served me at the bar was very friendly, but there was a moment when I asked the manager something and he answered very rudely and it was clear he wasn't in the mood, and he left me hanging. I felt super uncomfortable. Maybe I was just having a bad day. 👍
yall played g, it looked good BUT my food was cold and unseasoned

Our service was great! However, the host at the time (Jaime) was rude to one of the servers and that gave me a very bad impression. The server was trying to explain him something and he cut her off very rudely. That gave me a very awful environment

I called at 9:38 for two tacos. He said the kitchen is closed. You can’t place an order. I said what time does the kitchen close for next time? He says 940 haha Go elsewhere where they actually care

I appreciate your prompt response as an owner so I changed my review. The gentleman on Tuesday night was rude and short. I understand wanting to close the kitchen, but two tacos that are already cooked. I don’t think it would’ve disrupted that much. And the whole goal is to sell food so thank you for your response

Do not order online or for pick up. They WILL mess up your order or give you the wrong order and then will NOT give any compensation.  Way over priced IMO for the quality and horrible customer service.

Robotic "server" is ridiculous, getting out of my booth to serve myself is insulting. Its speaker is inaudible as it passes by for every tables order. Food was rough and the only server was clearly over worked

To loud for people with Hearing aids, even the person I was with said it was very loud and he doesn't wear hearing aids. The music was way too loud! I did not think the food was good at all. The chips were stale and the dinner that I got wasn't bad but it's nothing that I would want to run and go back to again. I'll never go there again. It was that bad. And not at all worth the price that we paid.
Some of the worst food I've had disappointing

Total rip off paid $60.00 for 2 burritos and 1 Quesadilla , one of the burritos steak was like rubber it went right in the garbage.. really pissed  me off .
They lost us as customers never will return.
Beware They raised the prices so high.

I ordered a ground beef chimichanga and they gave me shredded beef and I was already home when I noticed. I called back up to the restaurant and they said in order for me to get the order that I did order in the first place I would have to bring the order back up to them for them to do anything about it. Very poor customer service. We are frequent customers and I told them that and they still said there was nothing else they could do.

Terrible experience the male server who served me for my order a middle aged old guy with specs was an absolute disgrace. I came to this place for the first time and they put me on a table where the table was shaking and I had to put my leg on the table foot to stop it from shaking and that was not pleasant … the girls at the front of the door who receive guests like when they saw me they are like why are you here kind of expression… now coming back to the waiter / server who takes the order they guy with specs he took my order as I new to eating Mexican food it is his responsibility to tell me what is good and since I wanted to eat polo loco chicken and before that I wanted to have an appetizer I ordered thinking it is a small portion he took the order  and I flipped the page to eat polo loco chicken before ordering I asked him if it would be too much he did not understand I asked if I can eat the appetizer and polo loco he said it will be too much as the appetizer portion would be big and then I realized it was a wrong choice because it was not the one I ate in Netherlands and I wanted to eat polo loco when I said I would like to order polo loco and not the appetizer  he said he already sent the order well helooooo … what js going on here and he said I can eat polo loco some other day. I said yes I will eat but at a better place and not at this place again… then comes the appetizer I did not like it a bit and I felt it was something that was forced on to me to eat it … just ate little and rest was terrible for my pallet this could have been avoided if the guy taking the order was more kind friendly TERRIBLE EXPERIENCE…..
They don't take reservations regardless of party size. If someone wants to bring a large group to your restaurant, why would you turn that business away??
Very poor service. The manager and the server both messed my meal up and said they would remake and and still messed it up. If you want your meal messed up go here. Otherwise stay away.

I normaly love this place, but this location is not it compared to Farmington. I ordered on Grubhub because I love their Pastor tacos, I added beans/rice and they didnt give it to me. My tacos were cold and the tortillas were hard. No limes for my tacos and my drink came in a soup container with no straw. Highly dissapointed and will not be back to this location as their food does not taste as good and is poor quality.
Absolutely terrible food. Good drinks and service but absolutely AWFUL food
Food was not good, waiter kept ignoring us, went to check out and I believe he is either the manager or owner he was being dismissive definitely will not be back,

I was very much looking forward to stopping in based on the reviews. Left feeling disappointed in every way. We went in, and waited several minutes at an unbusy time for someone to even notice us standing at the host stand, to the point where we were wondering if we were supposed to sit ourselves. We finally got seated, and while our food got out at a reasonable time, our server did not bring refills of anything or ask the entire time we were sitting. Our food was lukewarm at best, and save for the specialty marinated pork taco and the refried beans, was bland. My Al Pastor taco was dry, burnt (not the good kind of char), and flavorless. There were plenty of staff but save for a couple of them, most were standing around in the staff area doing nothing. Idk if we caught them on an off-day or not, but it was a subpar experience all around.

Arrived was seated sat there for approximately 30 minutes while various waitresses served their tables a while trying to avoid making any contact with my table. Watched others come in after me and get waited on, their orders taken, and their food brought to them. Left after I saw that. Then on the way out, a waitress that was never seen before carrying a tray of food, runs after me on my way out the door saying she'll take care of me and to not leave. After 30 minutes of without any service, my decision was made.

I showed up today 15 minutes after my take out was supposed to be ready. The girl at the front looked for my order and then came back and hid behind another employee. I found that strange.
The other employee asked for my name, went to the back and also came back with no information about my order.

Thinking maybe I ordered from the wrong place I left, drove up the street to check at another restaurant. After the other restaurant came up with nothing I called Rio Luna back and tried to explain the situation. The girl on the phone was the same girl who checked for my order the first time, she cut me off and said "yes it's here".

Now, over 20 minutes after my order was supposed to be ready I walk back into the restaurant and was told it was just now getting bagged up. The same girl walks out with my order. I show her my text confirmation, with the time it was supposed to be ready and how it was under a different name (los tres amigos) and she just looks at me and shrugs. She did not care.

I finally get home with my order and my receipt was $8 less than what I paid?! I left a message for management right away, but haven't heard back as of yet.
Food was bland with not alot of flavor.

unanswered.review_text: Food was okay, ruined experience when the bill came and they charge $2 dollars extra for asking for more sauce that comes in a 2 ounce sauce cup. Which is complimentary with chips in the first place. Greedy, won’t be back. Plenty of other mexican restaurants with better food and service.

Last night I stopped by this place for a drink while I was waiting for some friends, so I sat at the bar. That was a mistake, I can tell you. The bartender really took his time, both to serve me and to bring my drink. They should hire more dynamic staff to provide better service.

Food is almost inedible. Cheapest imaginable chips and salsa to start, very bad house margarita and main dish flat out terrible. Hostess was very unwelcoming, but very friendly waiter. Food quality has to improve if the restaurant wants to survive with the prices they charge. There are too many better options around
I ordered my food and I picked up I waited Moro de 40 minutes and my food was so cold
Absolute crazy you take someone's id and walk away with it. NEVER SEEN THAT.  How do I know what your doing with it? If you want to scan it,  you should have machine at the tables.

Food was cold.  Sent it back. Came back cold again. The service was awful.  Took server 20 min to come and take our order.  He never came to check on us.  Took us a good 30 minutes to get 2 boxes and our bill after repeatedly requesting them.  He brought one box at a time and the bill a third time.

I got a to go order of Enchiladas Suprema
And the beef enchilada was stuffed with fake beef, some kind of soy beef substitute.   I know beef is expensive but thats shady especially since I’m allergic to soy.   How could I tell?  Ground beef isn't stretchy for one thing.   It just wasn’t actual hamburger, trust me.    Plus the veggie beef substitute is on the menu and in the kitchen.   Clearly they are swapping it out to save money and hoping people won’t notice.  Be forewarned.

Honestly the food wasn’t that great either.   I usually eat at the chain restaurant in Ann Arbor and their food is much better.

Came here for dinner with my mother..and ordered the fajitas amigos..and I had to literally search for the chicken and steak I had vegetables piled high and no meat less than 8oz of chicken and steak combined for 23bucks was not worth the combined presentation period..who is cooking back there? Seriously
Everything was greasy. The meat didn’t taste good. The grease was too overwhelming.

Just go to Taco Bell…smh I went to pick up my order that I called in. When I got there, the young lady told me that they just got a huge group in and that my order would be another 30 mins, but she did offer me a drink, and she was very nice. I understand things happen, that didn’t bother me. It was the Soggy chimichangas sitting in a pool of “house made “ cheese sauce that tasted like velveeta. Definitely pasteurized cheese. I ordered 3 dinners, and the meat was EXTREMELY salty in all three dinners. Beef tip and shredded chicken. The best part of the dinners were the rice and beans. It did not taste authentic at all. Everything tasted processed and over salted with the exception of the rice, beans , and salsa. The chips had no salt at all. $50 on dinners that we couldn’t eat, and it was too late to return them because they were closed. Maybe they were just having a bad day, but from the experience I had, I would NOT recommend them. Soggy chimis with over seasoned meat(the meat was tender )sitting in a pool of velveeta just made it inedible.
Quesadilla with guacamole lettuce and tomato comes like this? Orderd queso and guacamole, no chips.

Our first margaritas were terrible and did not have tequila. Upon telling the waitress, her response was to never come back to our table. Upon requesting the manager they decided to take $15 off of our $65 bill. When they brought our 3 year old her quesadilla, the plate sat under the heat lamp for so long that the cheese was congealed and the plate burnt her hand. The restaurant was basically empty on a Saturday night, so the excuse of the kitchen being backed up made no sense, which is what they told us why it took over an hour for our meals to come out.
High price, got wrong order definitely disappointed

Way overpriced for bad quality Midwest mexican.  I'd rather eat taco bell for these prices
Easily the most bland, boring, and disappointing Mexican food we've ever had. I went with a group of 5, and all of us mentioned how disappointing it was the next time we were together.

Received the worst service last night and Manager acted like it was no biggie. Waited 7 minutes after receiving food for silverware. Had to ask twice for refills and napkins. Brought us 3 napkins for a table of 5 smh. Great food but crappy service

I loved this place until today. Once a week I order the same lunch to work from here. Always the same exact meal . Sometimes they forget my taco sauce so I request it now, always no issue. Today I had the driver ask for taco sauce with my meal they said it’s a 4 dollar charge. lol I do not complain but I just spent 30 dollars on tacos and your not gonna give me sauce with it? Just over that small crap I won’t be back just off principle. That’s just wild to me. Let me eat my dry tacos 👌🏼

We have been going to this place for the past 20+ years. We have seen the change in management, change in food quality from good to average to good, and yesterday when we went it was really poor. I ordered a spinach enchilada with red sauce. They brought it out with green sauce, but then realized their mistake and changed it. My husband got a chicken enchilada but the chicken wasn’t cooked properly so he requested them to cook it thoroughly, but they offered another dish, and same mix up with the green and red sauce request.
NOW THE WORST PART!!! Since we did not have a good experience my husband did not give a tip. But when he checked his credit card statement today he noticed they have added a 20% tip without our authorization!!!! This is fraud and stealing!!!! Will not go there again and will definitely complain to better bureau of business!!

Came here to have a nice dinner with my family, the queso was good, but the rest of the food was bland and COLD, I told my server and she said the best she could do was MICROWAVE it!? I’m not paying $18 for a meal that was cold in The first place then microwaved, that’s insane, I sent it back and just didn’t eat. Honestly Taco Bell on the way home was better than this place. The birria was super bland my husband was very disappointed. On top of all of that I was having to hold the table leg down with my foot to stop the table from wobbling the entire time.Annoying.

Wish I could leave no stars  Orders wrong every time! Tried to give them another chance but def not making that mistake again Ordered 20 dollar birria flour tacos got corn AGAIN received no consume(literally what makes it a birria taco htf  do you forget the most important part) . Can’t call to fix it they keep they phone off so of course no way to contact to even attempt to make it right

Worst service I’ve ever had! Highly disappointed! My husband and I waited for half an hour to get water and waited another half an hour and still didn’t get our appetizers. People got seated way after us and they got their food and left before we did! Even made reservations way ahead of time, my husband called to make sure we were in the books and, was told yes and then we got there and was told we’re not taking reservations! So ignorant!

The food here is great, if you can get service. Had to call 4 times last week to get a worker to answer the phone. But I let it go, thinking they are probably busy. Get to the restaurant to pick up my food and there are 0 cars in the parking lot and every worker is walking around on their phones. This week it took 7 calls to get someone to answer the phone just to put put on hold for over 10 minutes. Guess we will see if they are busy tonight. Good food if you can get them to answer the phones

What a ridiculous experience! When we walked in, the restaurant had about 10 full tables. First, we waited around 10 minutes before anyone acknowledged us, even though there were staff close by. Once we were sat, it took about 10 minutes for a server to greet us/bring chips. We ordered 2 sodas and an appetizer. We had to go up to the bar to ask for our drinks after waiting 7-8 minutes after we placed our drink order. I wish we had gotten up and left at this point, but we were starving and figured it would get better. 6-7 minutes later, the Queso Fundido was served. It was disgusting - weird, congealed cheese, and dry clumps of chorizo on top. We weren't given any small plates to use. We had to go back up to the bar again for own refills on our drinks. Our food comes out, with 2 sides of beans and no rice (which we did not ask for.) We had to flag down our server/anyone we could find to ask from the correct side for our meal. Meals were terribly bland and on the cool side. The waitress did come back once to check on us (a few bites into our meals), but when we had finished eating, we had to get up again and go the host stand (and wait for someone to come by) to ask for carryout boxes and the check. More waiting - another 8-9 minutes before she returned to take care of the check. Honestly, I should have refused to pay. The service was horrendous and the food wasn't much better. We will never return.

If you go in for lunch and the 50s aged guy decides to wait on you (sitting at the bar), double check your bill when you go to pay.  Twice now, my bill has been normal but when it's swiping time, it's been doubled or things have been added.
Plus it seems he uses the language barrier to make mistakes which also adds things to your order.

The food is good.  But it's not worth the hassle.

Let's head over to CVS

food was good service wasn’t great we sat there wayy over an hour for our food and the service didn’t check on us for refills or anything and they don’t ever answer the phone like ever now i get the gratuity but that much for poor service and food is crazy and i always tip no matter what! we asked if we could split the checks and she said no to us then when we paid she had said the we could.

Horrible I called around 3 they said they don’t take reservations. I walked backed in and ask the girl in the front about walk ins she said they stop at 6:30 but she will put me on the waiting list. 7:30 I get a call I called back at 7:33 and Tino or what ever the guys name was in the front stated they called me a while ago! Which was a lie so horrible service stop hiring young people working the front on busy days like this! First time going and last time! Sorry Chris dolo
At los tres, I expect quality. So when I find an anemic fingernail clipping in my chicken burrito, you can imagine my disappointment in the manicurial and nutritional insufficiency of this place. 😟
Served me pop with slime in it. Obviously dont clean their pop machines. Hoping I dont get sick as I took a few sips before noticing.
Went to celebrate a family member birthday and their food was alright,  I had better.
First time here Dinner ordered Fajitas I thought I made a mistake by ordering since all I got was unions and pepper  2 or 3 pice s of meat   Over price.
My corn tortillas were moldy :( I cannot possibly eat here or recommend this place to anyone.

Saginaw, MI has some of the best tacos in the state, this place? NO NO NO. We came in around 7pm after Christmas shopping. We were starved. I got 3 different street tacos, and my husband got enchiladas. All had different meat from chicken to ground beef to pork and it was all burnt and had no flavor other than that of an over fired grill and that of a dirty pan. The margs were also not great 😕 they came out with warm goblets, that made the tequila thick and the ice melted so then we were left with watered down sour mix that was warm. My one star overall was for the food, I have never left a Mexican restaurant in Saginaw and been disappointed until tonight . The parking lot is pretty dark and it was ice due to recent weather. Our waitress was good, shy, but good. She didn't seem to know the menu prices but I digress

We frequent here often with no issues, staff are wonderful! However on our last visit on 12/18/25 I was violently Ill. Not saying that the food was bad, hubby had same dinner and was fine. But I have a severe allergy to shellfish (shrimp etc.) and though I can't prove it I'm sure there was so sort of cross contamination. It's the only thing that makes me that sick. Will have to wait until I feel trusting again to return 😕

We did not have a good experience tonight, unfortunately. The chips that were brought out with the salsa when we sat down gave off a rancid oil smell. I had the Quesadilla Rellena with beef chunks which was okay, though a bit overpriced at $13.99 for only 1 slightly filled flour tortilla and lettuce, tomato, and a tablespoon each of sour cream and guac on the side. My husband ordered the Enchilladas Supremas. I was so surprised when my easy-to-please husband said it might have been the worst meal he's ever had. He said the ground beef just did not taste right. I probably wouldn't have posted a negative review based solely on a meal that didn't quite hit the mark, but at 8:15pm the staff was vacuuming the vestibule area for several minutes as another staff member noisely used a broom and dustpan on the floor right next to diners. The restaurant was nearly 2 hours away from closing (10pm)! Really put off by our experience and it's doubtful we'll return.

Im done eating and in the car writing the review. They started putting the chairs on top of the tables at 9:15. 4 more parties came in after me. The place is too small to start closing with so many customers still in the store. Not the friendliest either. I will not return.
The Food and services was ok. I was over charged verses what my card was swiped for and the tip I left.  I I’ll never return.People pay attention to your receipts.

Today my husband and I went to Los Tres Amigos. I ordered the taco salad bowl with a side of rice and he ordered a chimichanga. To our surprise the food was like warm. We told the waitress and also said we don’t want to waist the food but wanted to let you know. She said she would let her manager know. The food was kinda cold, chesse wasn't even melted. Actually the last few time we've been here t he food wasn't very good.
I went and got a chorizo taco salad and my chorizo was burnt up and they charge extra for it

I dont write reviews unless there was something extremely good or very bad. This was bad. I live in the area. We stopped coming here because of the food and service years ago. They remodeled and its so much better now. The last time we were here a couple months ago, the serving sizes were small but pretty good. This time was very bad. There were 5 of us, we all sent our plates back.

The food we waited 35+ minutes for wasn't much warmer than room temp. How can the kitchen be slow and serve cold food? Saturday night should have your A-team kitchen staff. The sad, flat burritos were small and had little flavor. Who plates an already small burrito on a platter size plate with a puddle of liquid beans and tower of rice? $16, never again. First year culinary student mistakes there. I've had better/ more food from a food truck in half the time. There is another local place you’ll wait 60-90 minutes for a table and the burritos are $20+ but its so big you can get 3 meals out of it.

After 5 people sending the food back, we should have left and not eaten the replacement food, one of us didn't and sent it back again. We didn't pay for that one, she's the smart one. The saving grace was the server being nice and immediately called the manager. He was fast to come over but did not look like a manager with his regular jacket on. He was nice and 5 "new" plates of food came out in about 6-8 minutes. How does that work with a super slow kitchen?Management sets the tone of how a place is run. His appearance was pretty telling.

I'm genuinely concerned what my body is going to do over the the next 12-24 hours after this. Wish me luck.
Food  was cold and drink was watered down

I use to love this place. I went there today 11-28-25. And I got this dinner that was supposed to be pork tips with a chili type of sauce.  When it came to the table I'm picking around on the meat to see how tender the meat was. Well I come across a big pork bone. It look like a damn country rib. With no meat on it. So I told the waitress. She could take it back and I'm not paying for its nothing but bone and grizzle. It was the worst dinner I have ever had there. So a manger come's out and say's since you have eaten some of it. That the best he could do is give me half off my dinner. The only reason the I even had about two bites was because I was trying to deal with it. But there wasn't much meat there. Who is going to eat a big damn bone 🦴. And the waitress was bad to. Beware of the Big bone!

I ordered chicken fajitas & was brought chicken & steak. My plate was taken back to the kitchen & when returned I swear  had more veges & just the 1/2 amount of chicken! They had plug-in air freshers that went off periodically & flared my asthma! I told the waiter about it & he stated the restaurant did not have them; on the way out I pointed 1 out to him. Lastly,  we were presented a bill with only a total! Wont rush back... 🫤

If you came Mexican food, leave. I ordered a dish that said “tortillas filled with beef lettuce and cheese” imagine my surprise when the server came out with a plate of cold rice and beans with one taco that was seasoned with Ortega brand taco seasoning. The salsa was good, but you couldn’t pay me to believe the chips didn’t come from a bag. I got charged $10 for a weak dish lacking in flavor and food, not to mention the server acted like he didn’t what Coke was. I won’t be back.
Bad experience.

unanswered.review_text: Ordered two micheladas to go finished them in 3 sips since the girl filled both cups with ice and prepared them herself and I’m sure she just used one beer for both. Ordered two orders of fries they literally only put about 12 fries on each order. It should be illegal to be that cheap and an embarrassment. You can tell their business is going though it from how stingy they’re serving.

Went here for dinner, we order a few dishes. Two vegetarian dishes and two normal dishes. Restaurant was pretty empty when we came. Very nice aesthetics inside. We had order a vegetarian dish and asked for things to not be put inside our food as we didn’t like them, when receiving the order, they didn’t listen and put everything in it. We sent it back and told the server to take it back and bring it how we ordered it. After sending it back, that one dish took over 20+ minutes to get to the table which is really unpleasant when everyone was eating. We noted we had allergies and they wrote it down. But after my family has their food, they felt sick afterward. I ordered the big burrito, cheese had no flavor, the lettuce inside the wrap was soaking wet and tasted like chemicals. Upon reviewing the bill, they charged us for sides that we didn’t want. Very unpleasant experience. Manager told us that they can’t remove stuff off the items in the menu and charged us for something we didn’t want which is ridiculous. You should put in the menu that you can’t change or alter the items on the menu. If you dont like something, they will put it as a side and charge you for it. Manager didn’t even try and help us with anything. Don’t charge us for something we didn’t want. We won’t be back.

I usually don’t leave reviews, but the experience I had tonight was so unbearable, I wouldn’t be doing my due diligence in helping others save their money.

My wife ordered our family’s dinner and I planned on picking it up on my way home from work. When I arrived at the location, I waited 5 minutes to be greeted, there was no one in sight and when any of the employees would see me, they would just stare and keeping doing what they were doing.

When I was finally greeted, the waitress was nice “initially” and apologized for the wait. As she was handing me my food, she asked me was the meals paid for and I said yes. As I was ready to drive off, she comes out yelling stating I didn’t pay for the food. I told her my wife made the order and that I thought everything was taken care of on the phone. She angrily said “we don’t take payments over the phone!” As a worker of the restaurant, it’s your responsibility to check what the status of the meals are and what’s paid/not paid. How am I suppose to know your procedure? This is only my second time at this location.

So I told her I thought the payment was taken care of and it was no problem; I will come in and pay (it wasn’t a big deal). As I went back into the restaurant I was greeted by another employee named Tatyana (she was great and really helpful throughout the entire situation). When I began to pay for my food, I was told that the employee who caught my attention outside kept saying “I got him!”, which alluded that she actually thought that I was actually trying to steal even though I told her multiple times about the situation.

Fast forward, my family is eating and my son wanted chicken tenders and fries. As he was eating his chicken tenders he found a long piece of hair mid bite on his chicken, mind you he’s only 4 years old. I called the restaurant and talked to Tatyana again and she made sure he received a different order (which was the Mac & Cheese). After getting off the phone with Tatyana, my wife alerted me that she had hair in her rice. Now at this point I am angry and disappointed, this was a waste of my hard earned money.

When I went to pick up my son’s food, I told an employee what transpired with my wife’s food as well. At this point my wife was so disgusted she didn’t want any replacement for her food. I asked the employee if the chefs wear any hairnets or use gloves while preparing the food and I was told no. When I returned to my hotel to give my son his remade food, he showed me he had a long piece of hair in his food. We immediately threw all the food away.

I know this was long winded, but this was one of the worst experiences at a restaurant I’ve ever had and we will never return to this location. Beware ordering food from here because I was told there’s new management, save your money.

Garbage service, garbage food. They have no idea how to make a taco salad. Manager came over and said that the steak dinner was how it was supposed to look, it was a barely cooked yoga mat piece of steak with no diced onions or peppers. Unapologetic and rude. Do not come here.
Service was good but food was horrible. Wish I could say anything good about it. Our server was sweet though. Def won’t be going back though
Worst Mexican food I've ever tasted  September  30ths 1230 pm.. Someone needs to call ice

They literally was sweeping the floor, ignored us and kept sweeping while we was just standing there looking crazy! I just asked for the check ask for boxes and didn't want to give us boxes. My sister yes was heated and spazzed out but the level of disrespect was not caused for at all. We will NEVER return here EVER!!! $300 we spent here to be treated unprofessional as if we didn't matter. So guess what our money will didn't note support this place ever again. Food done fell off. Chicken dry, steak gummy and service is SHITTY!!

Went there for sweetest made reservations but I guess that didn't matter because she didn't ask if we had it or not nor did she greet us we stood there for at least a min or 2 and when she did recognize us it was to sit us down still no greet the food was good tho but I'm not going back out waitress was not best she wasn't bad either she just gave imma get a tip anyway our bill was $174 and she got a $25 tip

do NOT order takeout from this restaurant at all, food was 30 minutes late and the portions were very noticeably lesser than usual, I could see mostly tin and it was very sloppy. They do not care about your order if you're not in the restaurant. Go somewhere else for takeout
Got the $15 taco salad and it barely has any food in it. Do yourself a favor and go to Mr. Miguels instead, they know how to hook it up with nice portions.
Ordered two burritos to go brought them home as I live five minutes from there. They were cold and not that great of flavor.

Friendly and fast service but the food was pretty bad. Rice and beans were yummy but the chicken in my meal was inedible. Gritty and hard pieces. It's painful to spend $25 on a meal that you can't enjoy. :(

Came in on a Monday food is not authentic  Mexican. Tacos are ground beef or chicken  options. Sea food is mostly  shrimp. Drink are very heavy alcohol poured. The mac looks like Kraft box. Quesabirria consume was oddly  sweet. The burrito  is covered on in a white salty sauce.
Poor food, poor service, go somewhere else.

We stopped in for dinner on Friday night.  The hostess was prompt and took us to a table right away.  She bought chips and salsa soon after.  We sat for 15 minutes without anyone looking in our direction. Different servers were bouncing around the booths never bothering with us at a table. Nobody even brought water.  We left without anyone noticing us.

I'm sorry to say that we were very disappointed. My wife's chimichanga was supposed to be with chunky beef. It was hamburger. We were having trouble with our communication. I could barely find any chicken in my quesadilla. Once we had our food there was no refilling of water.  There were not many people in the restaurant, so it wasn't a matter of being too busy. I believe that the same person who served us had to do many other things including the bar.  On the positive side the server was willing to replace a margarita which had an off taste with a better cocktail.  Overall, the service and the food would have to be better for us to return.

This place WOULD be 5 starts across the board if the service here wasnt subpar . The last 5 times we've been given the wrong things we ordered, it takes forever to get refills on our waters, and the waiters are just rude and try to argue with me that i ordered the thing i didnt order.

Also change the name of the Big Burrito Amigos. Everytime i order it they bring out the regular burrito amigos and i have to get it remade

The smallest portions I've ever had at a Mexican restaurant. I payed almost $20 for what was basically a glorified taquito with a dash of a queso. Was the service amazing and the flavors of the food excellent? Yes, but don't go expecting more than a lunch portion

Super disappointed. The food was really good, but the service was absolutely horrible. Watched our waitress stand at the hostess booth and plan her phone while we were waiting for drinks and food. Never checked on us. Will not come back

Waited 15 minutes before anyone even acknowledged we were waiting. They walked right past us and didn't say a word. Finally sat us at a table and the seats were greasy with chips all over them and the tables were sticky. We turned around and walked out.

So disappointed! We used to love coming here! The food used to be amazing. When I got my enchiladas, the insides were cold. And I don't mean like Luke warm. Actually cold! And when I told them, they microwaved them and that just made them taste even more off. My sons cheese on the quesadilla wasn't even melted. I don't think we'll ever be back.

I'm a regular customer but will not be back as the attitude ruined the entire experience over 5.00.
